overall.description: A cinematic cutscene from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 depicting an Ultramarine recovering from being downed in a smoky, war-torn industrial battlefield at dusk, culminating in a reveal of his squad standing ready among the ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate close-up of downed warrior's armor

agents.ego_description: Space Marine is downed on the battlefield, shown in intimate close-ups of his blue and gold armor, purity seal, and face

entered.detail: uneven dirt and rock surface scattered with debris
blue Ultramarine power armor with gold trim and winged skull chest emblem
parchment seal with skull icon hanging from the armor

segments.scene_description: Intimate close-up shots focus on a downed Space Marine's armor details, purity seal, and face against the rocky battlefield ground. The atmosphere is dark and introspective with low lighting emphasizing the blue and gold armor details.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from ground level to standing

events.description: character places hand on ground in first-person view and begins to rise

agents.ego_description: Space Marine pushes himself up from the ground, transitioning from prone to standing position while looking upward

segments.scene_description: A brief transition shows a first-person perspective of a gauntleted hand touching the ground, followed by the character rising to his feet. The camera captures the heavy armored boots and the character's face as he looks upward with determination.

scene_state.functional_zone: war-torn battlefield with Space Marine squad formation

events.description: camera pans right to reveal squad of Space Marines standing in defensive formation
ambient warm light reveals the full extent of the smoky battlefield environment

agents.ego_description: Space Marine stands and observes his surroundings as the camera reveals his squad mates standing ready with weapons

notable_agents.action: Space Marine sergeant holding bolter rifle in ready position, leading the squad
Space Marine standing guard with weapon raised, scanning for threats

entered.detail: group of five Ultramarines in blue power armor standing in formation
large futuristic firearms held by the squad members
thick orange-tinted smoke drifting across the battlefield background

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to reveal a full squad of Ultramarines standing ready in a smoky, war-torn battlefield at dusk. The squad holds bolters in defensive positions while smoke drifts through the background, and the main character stands among them on the left side of the frame observing the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from an intimate, grounded perspective of a fallen soldier to a wide reveal of a military squad amidst a war-torn landscape. It begins with close-up details of a downed Space Marine's blue and gold armor and purity seal against the dark, rocky ground. As the perspective shifts, a gauntleted hand presses into the earth, leading the camera upward to capture the heavy boots and determined expression of the warrior rising to his feet. The scene then expands as the camera pans right, moving away from the individual to reveal a full squad of Ultramarines holding defensive positions with bolters. Finally, the view opens fully onto the smoky industrial battlefield at dusk, with the main character standing on the left as smoke drifts through the ruins around his comrades.
